mapper.sql: id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, website, github, twitter, location, disable_reason, password_reset_token, password_reset_expire, last_login_at, last_login_ip, last_username_changed_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version, recommended, recommend_weight
mapper.select: SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date} AND created_at < DATE_ADD(#{date}, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND created_at >= #{date}
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE (username = #{account} OR email = #{account}) AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM blog_user WHERE password_reset_token = #{token} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_user (id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, website, github, twitter, location, disable_reason, role, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{website}, #{github}, #{twitter}, #{location}, #{disableReason}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_user SET username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, website = #{website}, github = #{github}, twitter = #{twitter}, location = #{location}, disable_reason = #{disableReason}, password_reset_token = #{passwordResetToken}, password_reset_expire = #{passwordResetExpire}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, last_username_changed_at = #{lastUsernameChangedAt}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.password_hash, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.website, u.github, u.twitter, u.location, u.disable_reason, u.role, u.status, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.deleted_at, u.version FROM blog_user u LEFT JOIN ( SELECT following_user_id, COUNT(*) as fc FROM blog_user_follow WHERE deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY following_user_id ) fc ON u.id = fc.following_user_id WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 'NORMAL'
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.bio LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY
COALESCE(fc.fc, 0) DESC, u.id DESC
u.id DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user u WHERE u.deleted_at IS NULL AND u.status = 'NORMAL'
AND ( u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.bio LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user_follow WHERE following_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_article WHERE author_id = #{userId} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_user (id, username, email, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, bio, website, github, twitter, location, disable_reason, password_reset_token, password_reset_expire, last_login_at, last_login_ip, last_username_changed_at, role, status, created_at, updated_at, recommended, recommend_weight) VALUES (#{id}, #{username}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{bio}, #{website}, #{github}, #{twitter}, #{location}, #{disableReason}, #{passwordResetToken}, #{passwordResetExpire}, #{lastLoginAt}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{lastUsernameChangedAt}, #{role}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{recommended}, #{recommendWeight}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE username = #{username}, email = #{email}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, bio = #{bio}, website = #{website}, github = #{github}, twitter = #{twitter}, location = #{location}, disable_reason = #{disableReason}, password_reset_token = #{passwordResetToken}, password_reset_expire = #{passwordResetExpire}, last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, last_login_ip = #{lastLoginIp}, last_username_changed_at = #{lastUsernameChangedAt}, role = #{role}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, recommended = #{recommended}, recommend_weight = #{recommendWeight}, version = version + 1
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, email, nickname, avatar_url, bio, website, github, twitter, location, disable_reason, role, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version, recommended, recommend_weight FROM blog_user WHERE recommended = 1 AND status = 'NORMAL' AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY recommend_weight DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
